title: Verdict-Map Evidence Array Shape
description: Schema for the evidence array entries in the per-wave verdict map. Carries the trivial-token denylist, minimum length threshold, citation markers, and substance-pass tuning knobs used by the evidence-array gate. The gate runs two passes: (1) form — verifies each evidence string has the structural markers of a real citation; (2) substance — extracts a citable token from each form-passing item (longest backtick span, then longest double-quoted span, then longest contiguous run containing '/') and confirms that token appears in at least one file under the union corpus (session dir + project repo root), excluding the barrier dirs listed in x-substance-exclude-dirs. Evidence items with no extractable token are exempt from the substance pass. The top-level x-* extension fields are the load-bearing SSOT for gate consumers — hooks source them via jq rather than re-parsing nested definitions, mirroring the x-disallowed-fields convention in manifest-schema.json.

evidence.description: Per-assertion evidence strings. Each entry must be non-trivial: either longer than x-min-evidence-length or containing at least one x-evidence-citation-marker substring.

items.description: A single evidence item. Non-trivial when it exceeds the minimum length threshold or contains a citation marker (path separator, backtick quote, angle bracket, etc.).
